allow: Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@core 'sudo docker exec brenso-postgres psql -U brenso -d brenso -c "SELECT id, email, name, domain, brand_name, logo_letter, accent_color FROM coach;"')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@core 'sudo docker exec brenso-backend node -e " *)
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@core 'sudo docker exec brenso-postgres psql -U brenso -d brenso -c "\\d coach"')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ubuntu@core "sudo docker exec brenso-postgres psql -U brenso -d brenso -c \\"UPDATE coach SET brand_name='Genius', logo_letter='🧞' WHERE domain='genius.oriado.com' RETURNING id, brand_name, logo_letter;\\" && sudo docker restart brenso-backend")
